title: Detect the active project type when starting a session
description: This verifies that Kilo starts in a repository, identifies the project type, and shows the detected framework or language so the user can get project-aware help.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Ask how the current codebase is organized
Verify the detected project type is displayed
Verify project-specific guidance is shown

title: Confirm a safe project command before it runs
description: This test verifies that when a user requests a shell command, Kilo shows a safety prompt and only runs the command after explicit confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Kilo in a project directory
Ask Kilo to run a shell command
Verify a safety confirmation prompt is displayed
Confirm the command execution
Verify the command output is displayed

title: Review command execution before running a shell command
description: This verifies that Kilo shows a safety prompt before executing a requested shell command so the user can confirm the action.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Request a shell command to be run
Verify a safety confirmation prompt is displayed
Verify the requested command is shown for review

title: Run a command with safety confirmation and use the output
description: Verifies that a user can run a shell command, review the safety prompt, confirm execution, and inspect captured output.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Run a shell command
Verify a safety confirmation prompt is displayed
Confirm execution of the command
Verify command output is displayed

title: Explain how a code path works using code references
description: This verifies that Kilo can answer a question about code behavior by tracing definitions and references across the repository.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Ask how a function or class works in the codebase
Verify a code explanation is displayed
Verify related definitions or references are shown

title: Warn before a file-modifying change is applied
description: This test verifies that Kilo presents a confirmation step before applying a code change that modifies files, and the change appears only after approval.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Kilo in a project directory
Ask Kilo to generate a code change
Verify a safety confirmation prompt is displayed
Confirm the change
Verify the updated file content is displayed

title: Search for code and open a matching definition
description: Verifies that a user can search semantically for code, review matching results, and open a definition from those results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Ask to search for a relevant function in the codebase
Verify semantic search results are displayed
Open a matching definition from the search results
Verify the definition view is displayed

title: Find a symbol and open its definition
description: This verifies that Kilo can semantically search for a function or class and open the matching definition for inspection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Search for a function or class in the codebase
Open the matching definition
Verify the symbol definition is displayed
Verify the surrounding code context is shown

title: Capture command output and continue from results
description: This verifies that Kilo displays captured command output after execution and lets the user use that output to proceed with the task.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Request a shell command to be run
Confirm the action
Verify captured command output is displayed
Verify follow-up help based on the output is shown

title: Trace references from a definition across files
description: Verifies that a user can inspect a definition and follow cross-file references to understand how it is used.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Ask for the definition of a function or class
Verify the located definition is displayed
Open related references from the definition
Verify cross-file references are displayed

title: Block an unsafe destructive request until reviewed
description: This test verifies that Kilo interrupts a potentially destructive request with a warning and requires the user to review it before proceeding.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Kilo in a project directory
Ask Kilo to perform a potentially destructive operation
Verify a destructive action warning is displayed
Verify the action is not executed without confirmation

title: Apply coordinated changes across multiple files
description: Verifies that a user can request multi-file changes, review the proposed modifications, confirm them, and see the updated files.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Ask to apply changes across multiple files
Verify proposed modifications are displayed
Confirm the changes
Verify updated files are displayed

title: Understand code behavior through explanation and follow-up guidance
description: Verifies that a user can ask how code works, review the explanation, and request a suggested improvement with a clear recommendation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Ask a question about how the code works
Verify an explanation is displayed
Ask for a suggested improvement
Verify a recommendation is displayed

title: Inspect usages of a symbol across files
description: This verifies that Kilo can show where a searched function or class is used across the codebase after opening its definition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Search for a function or class in the codebase
Open the matching definition
Inspect usages across files
Verify cross-file usages are displayed
Verify the usages relate to the same symbol

title: Discover files and update a file with context
description: Verifies that a user can find relevant files, read one with context, request an edit, and review the updated content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Ask to find relevant files
Verify discovered files are displayed
Read a file with context
Verify the file content is displayed
Request an edit
Verify updated content is displayed

title: Generate new code and review the proposed result
description: Verifies that a user can request code for a new task and review the generated result before making changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Request code for a new task
Verify generated code is displayed
Ask for a refactor
Verify a refactored result is displayed

title: Generate code and review proposed multi-file changes
description: This verifies that Kilo can generate or edit code, present the proposed changes for review, and show the affected files before confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Ask Kilo to generate or edit code for a feature
Verify proposed multi-file changes are displayed
Verify the affected files are listed

title: Confirm code changes and verify updated files
description: This verifies that Kilo can apply approved code changes and then show the updated file contents after the edit completes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Ask Kilo to generate or edit code for a feature
Confirm the proposed changes
Verify the updated files are displayed
Verify the changes are reflected in the code view

title: Review code feedback and best-practice guidance
description: Verifies that a user can request a code review, inspect the findings, and then view best-practice recommendations.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Ask for a code review
Verify review findings are displayed
Ask for best-practice recommendations
Verify guidance is displayed

title: Continue a command-driven workflow after approval
description: This test verifies that after the user approves a requested command, Kilo captures the output and allows the user to use it to continue the task.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Kilo in a project directory
Ask Kilo to run a shell command
Verify a safety confirmation prompt is displayed
Confirm the command execution
Verify the captured command output is displayed

title: Delegate a review or testing task to a specialized agent
description: Verifies that a user can delegate work to a specialized agent, review the findings, and use them to deepen codebase understanding.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start Kilo in a project directory
Delegate a task to a specialized agent for review or testing
Verify the agent findings are displayed
Review the findings and continue the investigation
Verify broader codebase insights are displayed

title: Delegate a task to a specialized agent and review findings
description: This verifies that Kilo can send a task to a specialized agent, show the agent’s progress, and present the completed result to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Delegate a review, testing, or exploration task to a specialized agent
Verify agent progress is displayed
Verify the completed agent findings are displayed

title: Combine results from multiple agent tasks
description: This verifies that Kilo can launch multiple independent agent tasks and present their outputs together so the user can combine them into a broader understanding.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start a session in the current project
Launch multiple independent tasks with specialized agents
Verify each task output is displayed
Verify the combined results are presented together

title: Protect sensitive project content from direct exposure
description: This test verifies that when a user asks to inspect sensitive project content, Kilo handles it safely and still provides a non-sensitive result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Kilo in a project directory
Ask Kilo to inspect sensitive project content
Verify protected context handling is displayed
Verify a safe non-sensitive result is displayed

title: Handle an invalid command request safely
description: This test verifies that when a user asks for an unsupported or invalid command request, Kilo responds with a safe refusal or guidance instead of executing it.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Kilo in a project directory
Ask Kilo to run an invalid command request
Verify a safe refusal or guidance message is displayed
Verify no command execution output is displayed
